remote-lint.command: command -v yamllint >/dev/null 2>&1 || python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages --quiet yamllint==1.37.1; command -v ansible-lint >/dev/null 2>&1 || python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages --quiet ansible-lint==24.12.2; export ANSIBLE_CONFIG=/workspace/ansible.cfg; export ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_PATH=/workspace/collections${LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR:+:$LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR}; find . -path ./.git -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' \) -print0 | xargs -0 yamllint -c .yamllint && ANSIBLE_LINT_NODEPS=1 ansible-lint --offline playbooks collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform

remote-validate.command: mkdir -p .local/validation-gate /opt/builds/.policy-toolchain && LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR=/opt/builds/.ansible/collections LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_SHA_FILE=/opt/builds/.ansible/requirements.sha LV3_PACKER_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR=/opt/builds/.packer.d LV3_POLICY_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=/opt/builds/.policy-toolchain python3 scripts/run_gate.py --workspace . --status-file .local/validation-gate/remote-validate-last-run.json --source build-server-validate ansible-syntax schema-validation atlas-lint policy-validation iac-policy-scan alert-rule-validation type-check dependency-graph
remote-validate.local_fallback_command: mkdir -p .local/validation-gate .local/packer-plugin-cache .ansible/validation/collections .local/policy-toolchain && LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR=.ansible/validation/collections LV3_PACKER_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR=.local/packer-plugin-cache LV3_POLICY_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.local/policy-toolchain python3 scripts/run_gate_fallback.py --workspace . --status-file .local/validation-gate/remote-validate-last-run.json --source local-validate ansible-syntax schema-validation atlas-lint policy-validation iac-policy-scan alert-rule-validation type-check dependency-graph

pre-push-gate.command: mkdir -p .local/validation-gate .local/trivy-cache /opt/builds/.policy-toolchain && LV3_NATIVE_EXECUTION=1 LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR=/opt/builds/.ansible/collections LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_SHA_FILE=/opt/builds/.ansible/requirements.sha LV3_PACKER_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR=/opt/builds/.packer.d LV3_TRIVY_CACHE_DIR=.local/trivy-cache LV3_POLICY_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=/opt/builds/.policy-toolchain python3 scripts/run_gate.py --workspace . --status-file .local/validation-gate/last-run.json --source build-server-native

remote-image-build.command: test -n "$SERVICE" || { echo "set SERVICE=<service-id>" >&2; exit 1; }; test -n "$COMMAND" || { echo "set COMMAND='docker build ...'" >&2; exit 1; }; bash -lc "$COMMAND"
remote-image-build.local_fallback_command: test -n "$SERVICE" || { echo "set SERVICE=<service-id>" >&2; exit 1; }; test -n "$COMMAND" || { echo "set COMMAND='docker build ...'" >&2; exit 1; }; bash -lc "$COMMAND"
